description: render a template matplotlib plot (line/scatter/bar/histogram/heatmap/contour/box/violin/3d/all) to an image file
rules: forces MPLBACKEND=Agg so plt.show() never blocks
degrades gracefully when matplotlib is not importable
usage: Set PLOT_TYPE (line|scatter|bar|histogram|heatmap|contour|box|violin|3d|all). Optional PLOT_STYLE (default or any matplotlib style name) and PLOT_OUT (filename). Output: the rendered image under record_store.
limitation: Read-only: renders a demonstration figure from built-in sample data — it does not plot user-supplied datasets. Requires matplotlib (and numpy; scipy for the histogram fit overlay); degrades to a placeholder if matplotlib is absent.
